before.lore: Lines of text crisscross an ornate runic design: etlpasad uc kod ah krof cof nifah lasifrah. etlatlruc uc pah cof okcah lasifrah. etlpecoles uc elracits toc nucah lasifrah.

after.lore: Lines of text crisscross an ornate runic design: etlpasad uc kod ah krof cof nifah lasifrah. etlatlruc uc pah cof okcah lasifrah. etlpecoles uc elracits toc nucah lasifrah.

before.lore: An impenetrable fortress' greatest strength is psychological, a mythos built on the backs of a thousand attackers it has withstood. Your greatest strength is the belief that not one of those thousand could hold a candle to you.

after.lore: An impenetrable fortress' greatest strength is psychological, a mythos built on the backs of a thousand attackers it has withstood. Your greatest strength is the belief that not one of those thousand could hold a candle to you.

majorIds.Superconductor: Chain Lightning channels three massive lightning bolts through you, arcing to enemies within 8 blocks for 270% and stunning them for 1s. You take 10% more damage for 4s.

before.lore: There is nothing in these walls that will remain hidden forever. Nothing unaccounted for by the gleaming light of The Citadel.

majorIds.Superconductor: Chain Lightning channels three massive lightning bolts through you, arcing to enemies within 8 blocks for 270% and stunning them for 1s. You take 10% more damage for 4s.

after.lore: There is nothing in these walls that will remain hidden forever. Nothing unaccounted for by the gleaming light of The Citadel.

before.lore: These leggings were forged in honour of a martyr, who, legend has it, fought off a horde of the marauders for two days without food or rest to defend his village.

after.lore: These leggings were forged in honour of a martyr, who, legend has it, fought off a horde of the marauders for two days without food or rest to defend his village.
